name: YGSOFT Inc.
summary: YGSOFT Inc. provides enterprise management and social service information systems to the energy industry. The company also offers software and hardware products and services, and financial, information and big data analytics consulting service. In addition, the company provides power distribution network information services, energy management, energy information application, fuel solutions, and analytical equipment and solutions, as well as coal quality technology. Further, it offers Internet solutions; management tools for military industry; business extension platform; project management solutions; business travel management solutions; and invests in and finances business development platform. Additionally, the company provides various management field solutions in the fields of business analysis, governance, risk and compliance, financial management, purchase and sale of electricity, financial sharing, safety production management, consolidated statement, cost management, EAP integration, electronic file management, accounting, asset management, SME, material management, consultation, system integration, and wisdom check. It serves customers in energy, aerospace, high-end equipment, metallurgical smelting, and rail transportation industries. Ygsoft Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.
